dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: CRAP. I'M BLEEDING AGAIN! WHAT THE HECK IS A BUG DOING IN THE GARDEN?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH NO... I'M STARTING TO LOSE CONTROL AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WAIT, WON'T I DIE BEFORE THAT HAPPENS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HELP! SOMEONE PLEASE HELP ME!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: AH, DON'T BE SUCH A BABY. IT SHOULDN'T EVEN HURT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH? WAIT A MINUTE, IT DOESN'T HURT AT ALL! HOW IS THAT POSSIBLE? AND WHO JUST SAID THAT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE BUG JUST TURNED INTO A PERSON!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: HEY, NICE TO MEET YOU, NUMBER FOUR.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH? WHO IS THIS GUY?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE FOG IS GONE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, MY WOUND IS GONE TOO. SO IS ALL THE BLOOD. WHAT JUST HAPPENED?

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: SORRY. DID I SCARE YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: I WAS JUST MESSING AROUND. DON'T WORRY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MESSING AROUND? WHAT DO YOU MEAN? W-WAIT. WE HAVE TO LOOK FOR THAT BUG! IT WAS HERE A MINUTE AGO!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: THINK FOR A SEC. YOU RECOGNIZE ME, DON'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH, THAT'S RIGHT! I'VE SEEN HIM ON TV! HE CREATES A MIST USING HIS OWN BLOOD. THAT ENVELOPS HIS ENEMIES... THEN... HE MAKES THEM HALLUCINATE! THE GARDEN'S SECOND BUTTERFLY. HAJIN SEO. HAJIN SEO (21), THE SECOND BUTTERFLY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Y-YOU MEAN THAT I SAW JUST NOW... WAS AN ILLUSION?

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: BINGO!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: SORRY, DID I TAKE IT TOO FAR?

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: BUT IT WAS PRETTY COOL, RIGHT? DID I SURPRISE YOU? AHAHA, IT'S BEEN AGES SINCE I MANAGED TO TRICK ANYONE LIKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AND THIS IS THE FIRST TIME I'VE EVER WANTED TO PUNCH SOMEONE I JUST MET.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE BUG AND THE BLOOD LOOKED SO REAL, I CAN'T BELIEVE YOU CAN DO THAT. IT'S AMAZING.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: I KNOW, RIGHT? THANKS FOR THE COMPLIMENT.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: HERE! LET'S GET ALONG WELL AS FELLOW BUTTERFLIES.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH. HUH? WAIT A MINUTE...

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: FOR SOME REASON, THIS GUY REMINDS ME OF SOMEONE. OH RIGHT, I HEARD YOU LOSE CONTROL... AND GO ON A RAMPAGE WHENEVER YOU SEE YOUR OWN BLOOD. I SAW THE VIDEO OF YOU ATTACKING JAYEONG.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: O-OH... I'M SORRY ABOUT THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: HMM? YOU DON'T HAVE TO APOLOGIZE TO ME. YOU CAN TELL JAYEONG LATER, ANYWAY. I'M SUPER IMPRESSED THAT YOU HAD THE GUTS TO ATTACK SOMEONE AS SCARY AS HER! IT WAS SO BADASS! IF I DID THAT, I WOULDN'T HAVE STOOD A CHANCE. YOU'RE LUCKY SHE WENT EASY ON YOU! SHE'S THE GARDEN'S RESIDENT WILD DOG! HAHA.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WILD DOG? I DON'T THINK SHE'D BE HAPPY IF SHE HEARD THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: HEY, DID YOU NOTICE? JUST NOW, YOU WERE ABOUT TO GO ON A RAMPAGE WHEN YOU SAW THE FAKE BLOOD. BUT YOU CAME BACK TO YOUR SENSES AS SOON AS THE HALLUCINATION DISAPPEARED.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT ABOUT IT?

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: THINK ABOUT IT. THAT MEANS YOU DIDN'T LOSE CONTROL BECAUSE YOU WERE ACTUALLY BLEEDING. YOU LOST CONTROL AS SOON AS YOU THOUGHT YOU WERE BLEEDING. SO MAYBE THE REASON WHY YOU GO ON THOSE RAMPAGES DOESN'T HAVE ANYTHING TO DO WITH WHETHER YOU'RE ACTUALLY BLEEDING. MAYBE THOSE RAMPAGES ARE CAUSED BY SOME KIND OF PSYCHOLOGICAL TRIGGER.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'VE NEVER THOUGHT ABOUT IT LIKE THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: HM, IT ALMOST SEEMS LIKE A KIND OF PHOBIA. MAYBE YOU SUFFERED SOME SORT OF BLOOD-RELATED TRAUMA IN THE PAST. OR YOU DEVELOPED THAT REACTION FROM A PSYCHOLOGICAL SHOCK. IT'S JUST AN IDEA THOUGH.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: BUT I HEARD THAT YOU DON'T REMEMBER ANYTHING BEFORE YOU WERE 13.

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: UNFORTUNATELY, THAT MEANS YOU WON'T BE ABLE TO REMEMBER THE CAUSE NOW, NOT UNTIL YOU CAN RETRIEVE THOSE LOST MEMORIES.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MY LOST MEMORIES...

dialogue.speaker: Mae Hwa
dialogue.line: WHAT THE HECK IS WRONG WITH YOU?! I SAW EVERYTHING ON CCTV! WHY ARE YOU TRYING TO INTIMIDATE THE NEW BUTTERFLY?! YOU SHOULD KNOW THAT YOU'RE NOT ALLOWED TO USE YOUR POWER IN THE GARDEN!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: AH, NO, I-IT WASN'T LIKE THAT! I WASN'T PICKING ON HIM, I WAS GIVING HIM SOME SUPER USEFUL INFORMATION!

dialogue.speaker: Mae Hwa
dialogue.line: DON'T LIE TO ME! WHAT COULD YOU POSSIBLY KNOW?! AND I TOLD YOU TO REPORT BACK TO ME AS SOON AS YOU GET BACK FROM YOUR MISSION! YOU WENT MESSING AROUND AGAIN, DIDN'T YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: OH, RIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: Mae Hwa
dialogue.line: OH, RIGHT?! I HAVE TO GO HEAR WHAT THIS LITTLE BRAT HAS TO REPORT TO ME! GO GET SOME REST!

dialogue.speaker: Hajin Seo
dialogue.line: UGHS, DO I HAVE TO? O-OKAY. SEE YOU LATER.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT THE HECK JUST HAPPENED?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TRAUMA? I CAN'T REMEMBER ANYTHING ANYWAY. THERE'S NO POINT TRYING TO FIGURE IT OUT. BESIDES, COULD THAT REALLY BE WHAT CAUSED THIS?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE NEXT DAY

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TRAINING MYSELF TO GET USED TO BLOOD?

summary: The main character experiences a blood-induced hallucination, which is revealed to be an illusion created by Hajin Seo, 'The Second Butterfly.' Hajin Seo suggests the main character's rampages are a psychological trigger linked to lost memories and past trauma. Their conversation is interrupted by Mae Hwa, who scolds Hajin Seo for using his powers and dismisses the main character, who then contemplates training to overcome his blood-related phobia.
